task.question: Two shots before the second reviewed play, how many times does the spectator wave his flag while a ball lands near him?
initial_trace_steps: I watched the video to find the second reviewed play. The first review of a play occurs from 00:21-00:56, when footage is slowed down and reviewed several times. I continued watching to find the second review, which occurs from 07:21-07:30 when, again, footage is slowed down and reviewed. I then went back from this time range to find the spectator waving a flag. The first previous shot is from 07:13-07:21, when play occurs. Moving one more back, I found a spectator waving a white and green flag in the stands from 07:10-07:13. He waves his flag 4 times, making that the answer.
